meta.title: PACE RISE | Sports Technology – Track Pacing Systems
meta.description: PACE RISE leads innovation in track & field through Wavelight LED pacing systems. Real-time race management and QR bib systems deliver a new race experience.

hero.description: Revolutionizing every moment on the track with Wavelight LED pacing systems. From elite athletes to recreational runners, light leads your pace.

home.service_wavelight_desc: LED pacing lights run along the track, visually guiding athletes to their target pace. World-class technology proven at the Diamond League.
home.service_records_desc: Our Node.js-based real-time recording system lets participants instantly view and share their race results.
home.service_qrbib_desc: QR codes embedded in race bibs link directly to personal result pages. Spectators and families can cheer in real time.

about.title: About PACE RISE
about.subtitle: The people who innovate on the track
about.mission_desc: PACE RISE expands the possibilities of track & field through technology. Centered around Wavelight pacing system operations, we lead the digital transformation of event management.
about.tech_wavelight_desc: LED lights installed along the track move at the configured pace, delivering an intuitive race experience for both athletes and spectators.
about.tech_realtime_desc: Our in-house Node.js-based results platform enables instant web access to participant records.
about.tech_qr_desc: Scanning the QR code on a race bib instantly links to the runner's personal results page.

news.title: News
news.subtitle: Latest updates and stories from PACE RISE

contact.subtitle: Event management, Wavelight system inquiries, and more — feel free to ask.

footer.description: Innovation on the track — PACE RISE is with you.
